# CWE-455 negative: fatal exit when security TLS load fails (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-455-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/tls"
	"log"
	"net/http"
)

func StartHTTPServer() error {
	cert, err := tls.LoadX509KeyPair("/etc/hsm/tls.crt", "/etc/hsm/tls.key")
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatalf("hsm tls required at startup: %v", err)
	}
	_ = cert
	http.HandleFunc("/ready", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) { w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK) })
	return http.ListenAndServeTLS(":8443", "/etc/hsm/tls.crt", "/etc/hsm/tls.key", nil)
}
